info.name: MyAssetsHub — Profile API v1
info.description:
# MyAssetsHub Profile API

**Framework:** CodeIgniter 4 | **DB:** MySQL

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/api/v1`

**Auth:** Bearer Token — `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

## Folder Structure
- 👤 My Profile
- 💼 Experience
- 🎓 Education
- 🔑 Password & Account
- 👥 Social — Friends
- 🌐 Public Profiles (Agents)
- ⭐ Reviews
- ❌ Error Scenarios
- 🔒 Security Tests

## Auto-captured Variables
`token` → `u_id` → `exp_id` → `edu_id` → `review_id` → `target_username`
